_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.0.2)
+project(cras_msgs)
+
+find_package(catkin REQUIRED COMPONENTS
+  message_generation
+  sensor_msgs
+  std_msgs
+)
+
+find_package(Boost REQUIRED)
+
+add_message_files(FILES
+  Heartbeat.msg
+)
+
+generate_messages(DEPENDENCIES
+  std_msgs
+)
+
+catkin_package(
+  INCLUDE_DIRS include
+  CATKIN_DEPENDS message_runtime sensor_msgs std_msgs
+  DEPENDS Boost
+)
+
+install(DIRECTORY include/${PROJECT_NAME}/
+  DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_INCLUDE_DESTINATION}
+  FILES_MATCHING PATTERN "*.h"
+)

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+#pragma once
+
+#include <boost/pool/pool_alloc.hpp>
+
+#include <sensor_msgs/LaserScan.h>
+#include <sensor_msgs/PointCloud2.h>
+
+#include <ros/message_forward.h>
+
+//! Use this message type to allocate messages' buffers (vectors) from a shared pool of memory,
+//! which should result in much lower cost of frequent allocations.
+
+namespace sensor_msgs // we cannot change the namespace to cras_msgs :(
+{
+ROS_DECLARE_MESSAGE_WITH_ALLOCATOR(LaserScan, LaserScanPoolAllocated, boost::pool_allocator)
+ROS_DECLARE_MESSAGE_WITH_ALLOCATOR(PointCloud2, PointCloud2PoolAllocated, boost::pool_allocator)
+}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+Header header
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<package format="2">
+  <name>cras_msgs</name>
+  <version>1.0.0</version>
+  <description>Common messages used by CRAS</description>
+
+  <author email="peckama2@fel.cvut.cz">Martin Pecka</author>
+  <maintainer email="peckama2@fel.cvut.cz">Martin Pecka</maintainer>
+
+  <license>BSD</license>
+
+  <buildtool_depend>catkin</buildtool_depend>
+  
+  <build_depend>message_generation</build_depend>
+  <build_export_depend>message_runtime</build_export_depend>
+  <exec_depend>message_runtime</exec_depend>
+  
+  <build_depend>libboost-dev</build_depend>
+  <build_export_depend>libboost-dev</build_export_depend>
+  
+  <build_depend>sensor_msgs</build_depend>
+  <build_export_depend>sensor_msgs</build_export_depend>
+  
+  <depend>std_msgs</depend>
+</package>
